title: Advocacy for Sustainable Agroforestry
description: Promoting tree-based farming systems that improve livelihoods while restoring soil, water and biodiversity.

title: Innovative CSR Projects
description: Designing and implementing impactful corporate social responsibility projects in forestry and the environment.

title: Comprehensive Forestry Consultancy
description: Expert advice on forestry, wildlife, ecology, landscape management and forest product marketing.

title: Project Management & Impact Assessment
description: End-to-end management of environmental projects with rigorous monitoring and impact evaluation.

title: Tree Valuation Services
description: Scientific valuation of trees and forest assets for legal, compensation and planning purposes.

title: Public Education & Awareness
description: Workshops, training and awareness programmes that inspire communities to plant and protect trees.
